pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in task description, setup_task.sh (mkdir/rm), and export_result.sh (OUTPUT_FILE variable).
Explicitly defined in task description (URL https://metrics.torproject.org/rs.html) and export_result.sh SQL query (SELECT url FROM moz_places WHERE url LIKE '%metrics.torproject.org/rs%').

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating an output file exactly at /home/ga/Documents/guard_audit.txt and visiting the target domain metrics.torproject.org to search for Tor node fingerprints. The task uses live, non-synthetic data as the Tor Browser dynamically connects to the real Tor network and generates a local state file with actual Entry Guard fingerprints.
